scope: Deterministic coverage for PP&D permit paths that public guidance does not support through DevHub automation or that require manual/email handling.

unsupported_paths.permit_path: Permit request type not listed in PP&D DevHub application guidance
unsupported_paths.reason: PP&D DevHub guidance lists specific request types that may be started in DevHub. A path outside that supported list must not be automated as a DevHub application.
unsupported_paths.required_channel: manual PP&D contact or official non-DevHub intake channel

unsupported_paths.permit_path: Permit path where PP&D guidance directs the applicant to email or otherwise contact staff
unsupported_paths.reason: When official PP&D guidance requires email or staff handling, the next safe action is to prepare a handoff package rather than click through DevHub.
